title: Lighter DataPack
description: This Simple Data Pack Adds A Lighter To Minecraft
body:
- **[This Uses Dynamic Lights, So Use Optifine Or The Dynamic Lights Mod.]**
- **This Simple Data Pack Adds A Lighter To Minecraft**
- **Recipe: Four Iron Ingots, One Coal, One Flint.**

Injoy This Data Pack :)
- **Functions:**
- lighter:give
